Need opentelemetry + tracing-opentelemetry + OTLP exporter dependencies and configuration.","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"task","owner":"chris.bartling@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T21:56:45Z","created_by":"Christopher Bartling","updated_at":"2026-03-04T21:56:45Z"}

new_value: Added opentelemetry + opentelemetry_sdk + opentelemetry-otlp + tracing-opentelemetry. OTLP gRPC export activates when OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT is set. All 496 tests pass.

old_value: {"id":"otherworlds-rpg-8h9","title":"Add observability to web and iOS clients","description":"Neither the SvelteKit web client nor the Swift iOS client has any observability infrastructure. The Rust backend has full OpenTelemetry tracing with OTLP export, but both clients are black boxes. Web client: only 2 dev-only console.log() calls, no structured logging, no OTel, empty hooks.server.ts. iOS client: no os.log, no Logger, no crash reporting, no tracing. Correlation IDs are supported in both HTTP layers but never generated. Need to add structured logging and OpenTelemetry trace propagation to both clients to enable end-to-end request tracing across the full stack.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"chris.bartling@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T17:11:54Z","created_by":"Christopher Bartling","updated_at":"2026-03-05T17:11:54Z"}

new_value: Full observability added to both clients. Web: OTel SDK with OTLP export, request spans in hooks, API client spans, correlation IDs. iOS: os.Logger, OSSignposter, auto-generated correlation IDs, structured logging in HTTPClient and all 14 ViewModels. All tests pass (170 iOS, 3 web).
Implemented full Grafana LGTM stack: OTel Collector, Tempo 2.7.2, Loki, Prometheus, Grafana with auto-provisioned datasources. Verified end-to-end trace pipeline with linked web→api spans.

old_value: {"id":"otherworlds-rpg-ydn","title":"Implement timeline branching event replay","description":"Timeline branching in otherworlds-session currently records intent only — it does not replay source run events onto the forked stream. Implement the actual event replay mechanism so that branching creates a new timeline with the source run's events up to the branch point.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"chris.bartling@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T21:01:45Z","created_by":"Christopher Bartling","updated_at":"2026-03-05T21:01:45Z"}

new_value: Implemented cross-context event replay for timeline branching: RegisterAggregate command/event in session crate, clone_events_for_branch in core, MultiAggregateEventRepository for testing, and orchestrate_branch_timeline in API crate. 14 new tests across 4 crates.
Already implemented. All 7 domain contexts (narrative, character, inventory, session, world-state, rules, content) have full iOS implementations: models, endpoints, viewmodels, views, and tests.

old_value: {"id":"otherworlds-rpg-i6h","title":"Web client API integration","description":"The SvelteKit web client has route skeletons for all contexts but no actual API integration. Connect the frontend routes to the backend REST endpoints, implementing fetch calls, state management, and error handling for each context.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"chris.bartling@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T21:01:42Z","created_by":"Christopher Bartling","updated_at":"2026-03-05T21:01:42Z"}

new_value: All 7 domain contexts now have full web client API integration. Added missing /rules routes (list + detail with declare-intent, resolve-check, produce-effects, archive). Added Inventory, World, and Rules nav links. Existing contexts (campaigns, characters, inventory, world-state, sessions, narrative/play) were already fully implemented.

Already implemented. POST /api/v1/play/resolve-action orchestrates the full play loop: rules intent → rules check → rules effects → world state → narrative. Documented in ADR-0014. 5 tests cover happy path, correlation ID threading, error handling, and edge cases.
